title: Netherite Lite Armor + FPS Boost
description: A clean and compact redesign of Netherite armor with a modern, minimal look. Keeps the vanilla Netherite feel while improving visibility and reducing bulk—perfect for PvP and everyday play.
body: # Netherite Lite – Clean & Compact Armor Netherite Lite reimagines Minecraft’s heaviest armor with a clean, compact, and modern redesign. The bulky vanilla Netherite set is transformed into a slimmer, sharper look while preserving its powerful Netherite identity.
